---
title: "Mathematical Physics"
format: html
---

# Mathematical Physics

These are the lecture notes and exercise lists for the Mathematical Physics course. The material is organized by topic, building from the Dirac delta distribution and Green's functions to propagators, symplectic structures, and the quantization of scalar fields. The content is under development. This course material is in portuguese.

## Course Outline

- [Dirac Delta](delta-dirac-green.qmd)
- [Green Functions](green-functions-nd.qmd)
- [Propagators and Symplectic Structures](propagators-symplectic.qmd)
- [Propagators: Complete Solutions](propagators-cont.qmd)
- [Propagators in Field Theory](propagators-fields.qmd)
- [Scalar Fields](scalar-field.qmd)
- [Scalar Fields: Propagators and Vacuum](scalar-propagators.qmd)

{{< include /_footer.qmd >}}
